title: taraxacum atrilimhatum
intro: Taraxacum atrilimhatum, also known as the lesser dandelion or small dandelion, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family, characterized by its smaller size and darker coloration compared to the common dandelion. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum atrilimhatum are attributed to its roots, leaves, and flowers, which contain flavonoids, terpenoids, and sesquiterpenes that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum atrilimhatum include its potential to support liver function, reduce inflammation, and aid in digestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various health issues. Taraxacum atrilimhatum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
